phrases.intent_en: Ask what festivals are happening this week
phrases.text_local: Quels festivals ont lieu dans le quartier cette semaine ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel fes-tee-VAHL on LYUH dahn luh kar-tee-YAY set suh-MEN
phrases.cultural_note: The Quartier des Spectacles is the cultural heart of Montréal and hosts world-famous festivals including Jazz Festival, Just For Laughs, and Osheaga.

responses.english: You need to check on the website.
responses.phonetic: eel foh vay-ree-FYAY soor luh SEET ahn-tair-NET
responses.french: Il faut vérifier sur le site internet.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a ticket to a show at Place des Arts
phrases.text_local: Je cherche des billets pour un spectacle à la Place des Arts.
phrases.pronunciation: zhuh SHAIRSH day bee-YEH poor un spek-TAHKL ah lah PLASS day ZAHR
phrases.cultural_note: Place des Arts is Montréal's premier performing arts complex. It houses multiple concert halls and is the centrepiece of the Quartier.

responses.english: At the ticket office, over there.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the box office is
phrases.cultural_note: 'Le guichet' means box office or ticket window. In Québec you'll also hear 'la billetterie' for the ticketing office at larger venues.

responses.english: Right across from Place des Arts.
responses.phonetic: zhoost ahn FAHSS duh lah PLAHSS day ZAHR
responses.french: Juste en face de la Place des Arts.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the free outdoor programming
phrases.text_local: Les spectacles extérieurs gratuits, ça commence à quelle heure ?
phrases.pronunciation: lay spek-TAHKL ex-tay-ree-UR gra-TWEE sah ko-MAHSS ah kel UR
phrases.cultural_note: During summer festivals, the Quartier hosts free outdoor concerts on the Esplanade Clark. Bring a blanket and enjoy world-class acts for free.

responses.english: It is posted on the neighbourhood signs.
responses.phonetic: say tah-fee-SHAY soor lay pah-NOH doo kar-TYAY
responses.french: C'est affiché sur les panneaux du quartier.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to grab food before a show
phrases.text_local: On peut manger quelque chose de bon avant le spectacle ?
phrases.pronunciation: on puh mon-ZHAY kel-kuh SHOHZ duh BON ah-VAH luh spek-TAHKL
phrases.cultural_note: The neighbourhood around Place des Arts has excellent pre-show dining. Chinatown is a short walk away for affordable options.

responses.english: There are restaurants on Sainte-Catherine Street.
responses.phonetic: eel ee ah day res-toh-RAHN ROO sahnt-kah-REEN
responses.french: Il y a des restaurants rue Sainte-Catherine.
